title: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 05 January 2024

section_path_text: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 05 January 2024
summary:
Main
in Weekly Demolition Reports 06/01/2024
Inconsistent setting characterized the ship recycling activities for this week in the new year. There was no significant demand in India, where the market remained unchanged
Source: Best Oasis Limited

[Page 2]
Highlights of the week
Inconsistent setting characterized the ship recycling activities for this week in the new year. There was no significant demand in India, where the market
remained unchanged and is anticipated to progressively decline.
